name: Virtual Stakeholder PM
summary: Owns stakeholder analysis, dependency mapping, and adoption friction tracking.
problem: Stakeholder concerns are currently handled informally, which weakens prioritization and rollout decisions.
goals: Identify stakeholders, incentives, blockers, and decision ownership.
Explain adoption friction before delivery work starts.
Support roadmap and release planning with stakeholder constraints.
acceptanceCriteria: Stakeholder reports identify owners, incentives, risks, and required coordination.
